name: Flaeskeaeggekage (Bacon & Egg Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bacon into half-inch strips and fry over moderate heat until it is no longer crisp.
2. Drain on paper towels and place in a preheated 200°F oven to keep warm.
3. Reserve one tablespoon of bacon drippings for later use.
4. Combine flour and salt with the eggs, stirring just long enough to mix them together.
5. Gradually add milk while continuously stirring until fully incorporated.
6. Warm the reserved bacon drippings in a 10-inch heavy skillet over moderate heat.
7. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet containing the warm drippings.
8. Reduce the heat to low and allow the eggs to set into a firm custard for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
9. Arrange bacon slices and chopped chives on top of the finished cake.
10. Serve directly from the pan.
